zh.lifeSummary: 當Electa Rebecca Judson於1675年3月12日出生在美國康乃狄克州費艾費爾德史達科特時，她的父親John Judson27歲，母親Elizabeth Chapman26歲。她於1695年與Charles Hughes在美國賓夕法尼亞州德拉沃拉德諾 堂史普結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1747年在美國賓夕法尼亞州艾利吉拉德 堂史普弗朗西斯享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Electa Rebecca Judson于1675年3月12日出生在美国康涅狄格州費艾費爾德史達科特时，她的父亲John Judson27岁，母亲Elizabeth Chapman26岁。她于1695年与Charles Hughes在美国宾夕法尼亚州德拉沃拉德諾 堂史普结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1747年在美国宾夕法尼亚州艾利吉拉德 堂史普弗朗西斯享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Judson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Judd + -son.

variants.name: Getson
meanings: English (Middlesex): variant of Jutson, either a habitational name from Jurston, in Chagford (Devon), or a variant of Judson . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Judd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Judde, Jutte, a pet form of Jordan .

nameMeanings.name: Rebecca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Latin form of the Hebrew name Rebekah, borne by the wife of Isaac, who was the mother of Esau and Jacob (Genesis 24–27). The Hebrew root occurs in the Bible only in the vocabulary word marbek ‘cattle stall’, and its connection with the name is doubtful. In any case, Rebecca was Aramean, and the name probably has a source in Aramaic. It has always been common as a Jewish name; in England and elsewhere it began to be used also by Christians from the 14th century onwards and especially at the time of the Reformation, when Old Testament names became popular. It was very common among the Puritans in the 17th century, and has enjoyed a tremendous vogue in England since the latter part of the 20th century, among people of many different creeds. In Scotland this is found as an Anglicized form of Beathag .

en.lifeSummary: When Electa Rebecca Judson was born on 12 March 1675, in Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, United States, her father, John Judson, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth Chapman, was 26. She married Charles Hughes in 1695, in Radnor Township, Delaware, Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1747, in Francis, Girard Township, Erie, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Electa Rebecca Judson est née le 12 mars 1675, à Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, États-Unis, son père, John Judson, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Chapman, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Charles Hughes en 1695, à Radnor Township, Delaware, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1747, à Francis, Girard Township, Erie, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Electa Rebecca Judson am 12. März 1675 in Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Judson 27 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Chapman 26. Sie hat 1695 in Radnor Township, Delaware, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten Charles Hughes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1747 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Francis, Girard Township, Erie, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Electa Rebecca Judson è nata il il 12 marzo 1675 nel Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, John Judson, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Chapman, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Charles Hughes nel 1695, nel Radnor Township, Delaware, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1747, nel Francis, Girard Township, Erie, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Electa Rebecca Judsonが1675年3月12日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ファイルフィールドストラトフォードで生まれた時，父John Judsonは27歳，母Elizabeth Chapmanは26歳であった。1695年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州デラワーラドノー トウンシュイップでCharles Hughesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1747年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州エリーギラルド トウンシュイップフランシスで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Electa Rebecca Judson(이)가 1675년 3월 12일 미국 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스트라트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Judson(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Chapman(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1695년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 데로르 라드너 타운시프에서 Charles Hughes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1747년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 에리 지라르드 타운시프 프랜시스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Electa Rebecca Judson nasceu em 12 de março de 1675, em Stratford, Fairfield, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Judson, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Chapman, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Charles Hughes em 1695, em Radnor Township, Delaware, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1747, em Francis, Girard Township, Erie, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Electa Rebecca Judson родилась 12 марта 1675 г. в местности стратфорд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени John Judson было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Chapman, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Charles Hughes в 1695 г. в местности раднор тоуншип, делавар, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1747 г. в местности фрэнсис, гирард тоуншип, эри, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Electa Rebecca Judson nació el 12 de marzo de 1675, en Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Judson, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Chapman, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Charles Hughes en 1695, en Radnor Township, Delaware, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas.
